valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Fri 3 Apr 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Sat 4 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low Fair Isle 983 expected Norwegian Sea 980 by midday tomorrow. New low expected Rockall 990 by same time. High 100 miles west of FitzRoy 1028, slow-moving, dissipating
